# Vendored assets

## d3.v7.min.js

- **Version:** 7.9.0 (banner: `https://d3js.org v7.9.0 Copyright 2010-2023 Mike Bostock`)
- **Source:** https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js (fetched 2026-07-03)
- **License:** ISC (Copyright 2010-2023 Mike Bostock, https://github.com/d3/d3/blob/main/LICENSE)

This file is embedded verbatim into the offline HTML report produced by
`antipasta report` so the report has zero network dependencies. At embed time
`antipasta.report.html` rewrites `://` inside the script to the equivalent
JS string escape `:\/\/` so the emitted document contains no `http(s)://`
byte sequences (the values at runtime are unchanged; they are d3's internal
XML-namespace constants, not network references).

Do not edit this file by hand. To upgrade, re-download from d3js.org and
update this note with the new version.
